title: The Emperors Face the Worst Generation
description: On pages 17–20, this part focuses on Unknown person #17, Unknown person #18, Unknown person #19, Sanji, Unknown person #20 as The raid nears its climax as Zoro and Sanji settle their commander fights while Law and Kid confront Big Mom.
scene: The raid nears its climax as Zoro and Sanji settle their commander fights while Law and Kid confront Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Well, well. They really did show up.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Heh heh heh. He don't know when to give up.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's keep this simple and decide it by sales, shall we?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: SJIF -

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We'll do the count three hours from now.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Whoever's sold the most by then wins.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: fine by me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: splendid. Well then...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Let the SOBA battle ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Begin!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Two Soba Bowls here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: One Bowl here!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: MM, YES! This is the flavor I love!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It soaks up so much of the broth! Delicious!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: No one can beat Haraguroya for Soba!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: HARA- Guraya

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Well, Mister? This is reality!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How about you turn tail and run while you still can!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: O-oh no! It's just begun and already we're behind!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: HMP4. These folks already have their favorite SOBA stall. They aren't interested in any new joint.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sangoro! Are you sure this is gonna work out?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I did what you said and got the ingredients you told me to...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...but they're steamrolling us in the flour department.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Relax.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just sit back and watch. With this many gawkers...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: ...All it'll take is one bowl...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: ...to turn this battle around.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ooh. Now that I look, he's quite the handsome one.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: One bowl of noodles, please.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: And for me!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Gladly, ladies.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: order up!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 32 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
